title: Funds
doc_html:
§1071.5. Funds

            The department may receive monies from any source, including state and federal funds, grants, and gifts which shall be expended for the purposes designated in this Part.

            Added by Acts 1981, No. 690, §2; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.116 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1071.5.  Funds
The department may receive monies from any source, including state and federal
funds, grants, and gifts which shall be expended for the purposes designated in this Part.
Added by Acts 1981, No. 690, §2; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.116 by HCR 84
of 2015 R.S.
